title: AuthMethod and RsaRawOp manual column alignment breaks rustfmt
description: auth.rs AuthMethod and rsa.rs RsaRawOp use manual space-padding to align discriminant values and trailing comments into columns. cargo fmt --check reports diffs for both files at these enums. Manual alignment defeats rustfmt and will drift whenever a variant is added. Suggested rewrite: let rustfmt own the formatting; move the C constant names into the doc comment above each variant rather than a trailing inline comment.
